names.name: William
names.origin: Germanic royal tradition brought by English colonists; became foundational in early American naming.

names.name: Elizabeth
names.origin: Hebrew biblical name popularized in England and colonial America; associated with Queen Elizabeth I.

names.name: James
names.origin: Hebrew origin via Latin and English; biblical apostle name adopted widely in colonial America.

names.name: Margaret
names.origin: Greek name meaning pearl; adopted in Germanic and English traditions; common in colonial families.

names.name: John
names.origin: Hebrew biblical name; became the most common American male name from colonial times onward.

names.name: Mary
names.origin: Hebrew biblical name; most popular American female name for centuries.

names.name: Thomas
names.origin: Aramaic biblical apostle name; widespread in colonial and early American tradition.

names.name: Catherine
names.origin: Greek origin via Latin; widespread in English and European American families.

names.name: Charles
names.origin: Germanic royal name; popular among American colonial elite and nobility.

names.name: Anne
names.origin: Hebrew biblical name; English variant of Anna; common in colonial America.

names.name: Robert
names.origin: Germanic name; widespread in English tradition and adopted throughout colonial America.

names.name: Sarah
names.origin: Hebrew biblical matriarch name; popular in Puritan and colonial American families.

names.name: Michael
names.origin: Hebrew archangel name; became popular in American tradition in 20th century.

names.name: Jennifer
names.origin: Cornish-English literary creation popularized by Arthurian legend; became extremely popular mid-20th century.

names.name: David
names.origin: Hebrew biblical king; widespread in American tradition.

names.name: Susan
names.origin: Hebrew origin via Latin; English form; popularized in mid-20th century America.

names.name: Richard
names.origin: Germanic royal name; common throughout English and American history.

names.name: Patricia
names.origin: Latin origin; feminine form of Patrick; popularized in early 20th century America.

names.name: Joseph
names.origin: Hebrew biblical name; popular in colonial American tradition, especially Catholic families.

names.name: Barbara
names.origin: Greek origin meaning foreign; popularized in early 20th century American culture.

names.name: Christopher
names.origin: Greek origin; saint's name; became prominent in American tradition in late 20th century.

names.name: Jessica
names.origin: Hebrew origin via Shakespeare's Merchant of Venice; popularized in late 20th century.

names.name: Daniel
names.origin: Hebrew biblical prophet name; steady popularity throughout American history.

names.name: Ashley
names.origin: English place name meaning ash tree grove; became unisex and then predominantly female in late 20th century.

names.name: Matthew
names.origin: Hebrew biblical apostle; popularized in American tradition especially in late 20th century.

names.name: Amanda
names.origin: Latin origin; means worthy of love; created or popularized in 18th century; became very popular in 1980s America.

names.name: Andrew
names.origin: Greek origin; biblical apostle; increasingly popular in American tradition from 20th century onward.

names.name: Brittany
names.origin: English regional name derived from Brittany, France; popularized in 1990s America.

names.name: Brandon
names.origin: English place name and surname; became popular as given name in late 20th century America.

names.name: Nicole
names.origin: Greek origin via French; feminine form of Nicholas; popularized in late 20th century.

names.name: Kyle
names.origin: Scottish Gaelic origin; place name; popularized as given name in late 20th century America.

names.name: Alexis
names.origin: Greek origin; unisex name popularized in 1990s and 2000s American culture.

names.name: Tyler
names.origin: English occupational surname; became popular given name in late 20th century America.

names.name: Rachel
names.origin: Hebrew biblical name; experienced renewed popularity in late 20th century America.

names.name: Justin
names.origin: Latin origin; derived from Justus; popularized in late 20th century.

names.name: Victoria
names.origin: Latin origin; feminine of Victor; popularized by Queen Victoria; resurging in 21st century.

names.name: Zachary
names.origin: Hebrew biblical name; variant of Zechariah; popularized in late 20th century America.

names.name: Sophia
names.origin: Greek origin meaning wisdom; surged in popularity in 2000s-2010s America.

names.name: Ethan
names.origin: Hebrew biblical name meaning firm and strong; became top popular name in 2000s America.

names.name: Olivia
names.origin: Latin origin possibly derived from 'oliva' (olive); popularized by Shakespeare; top name in 2010s America.
